ensemble: 2x opus-4.8 (inside/outside) + 2x codex gpt-5.5 xhigh; round-2 half-anchor on cruxes

items.title: Fed maintains rate (0bps hike) at the July 29, 2026 FOMC meeting
items.rationale: CORE: CME FedWatch (2026-07-07) implies ~73% hold / ~26% 25bp-hike, no cut priced; consensus 0.73 vs market ~0.77. RISK: incoming data / FOMC June minutes (07-08) could firm the hike tail. DISAGREEMENT: none material (family divergence 0.03); NO-side edge only ~3pt, below the 0.035 live gate. Won't fade CME on noise -> no-trade.

items.title: SpaceX launches Starship flight test #13 before July 17, 2026
items.rationale: BLIND ESTIMATE VOIDED BY VERIFICATION: round-1 was fed a stale 'NET July 31' date and returned ~0.04 (strong NO). VERIFIED (2026-07-08) nextspaceflight + spacelaunchschedule now show NET Tue July 14, 22:45 UTC -- INSIDE the window ('Date/Time May Change'). Re-estimated free of half-anchor per PROTOCOL 3.5. CORE: NET is real but soft; Ship 40 static fire done (Jul 1) BUT Booster 20 (first-flight 33-engine Super Heavy) static fire unconfirmed and FAA launch license unconfirmed ~6 days out; new-vehicle debut NETs slip more often than hold. Corrected consensus 0.27 vs market ~0.22 -> ~3pt YES edge, below gate; Codex landed exactly on market. Family divergence 0.10 (borderline). NO-TRADE (efficient after correction; verification prevented a wrong-signed NO bet).

items.title: The Odyssey (Nolan) Rotten Tomatoes Tomatometer above 90 (settle 2026-07-20)
items.rationale: CORE: embargoed premiere reactions (07-06 London) overwhelmingly positive, Best Picture frontrunner; Nolan prestige-epic cluster (Oppenheimer 93 / Dark Knight 94 / Dunkirk 92) all cleared 90 and this film is in that mode. RISK: strict >90 bar is fragile once wide-release reviews broaden; one mixed dissent (IndieWire 'too clunky'). DISAGREEMENT: Opus intra-family blind spread 0.72 vs 0.60 = 0.12 (>0.10) -> FLAGGED for human review (inside-view vs base-rate tension). Round-2 (half-anchor, market 0.72 revealed) lifted family finals to 0.66/0.68; consensus 0.67 vs market 0.72 -> NO edge ~4pt, sub-threshold after fees -> no-trade.
